pattern: Collect every root-to-leaf path whose values add up to the target; the order of the paths is free but each path is the fixed top-down sequence.
hints: Each result is the ordered list of node values from the root down to one leaf, so build the path as you descend and copy it when a leaf matches.
Backtrack: push the current value before recursing into the children, then pop it on the way back up so siblings start from the right prefix.
Only record a path at a leaf (no children) when the running sum equals the target; internal matches do not count.

edge_inputs.description: two distinct root-to-leaf paths reach the target
internal sum matches but no leaf path does
two-node tree, target reached only at the leaf not the root
negative values combine to the target

stress.description: random tree; target is the sum of a real planted leaf path so at least one answer exists
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    arr = [rng.randint(-20, 20)]
    for _ in range(n - 1):
        arr.append(rng.randint(-20, 20) if rng.random() < 0.75 else None)
    idx = 0
    total = arr[0]
    while True:
        l, r = 2 * idx + 1, 2 * idx + 2
        children = [c for c in (l, r) if c < len(arr) and arr[c] is not None]
        if not children:
            break
        idx = rng.choice(children)
        total += arr[idx]
    return [arr, total]
stress.note: small values keep collisions plausible so multiple matching paths can appear
